description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Deploy to npm that triggers on published releases. Run a precompile job on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest environments with Node.js 16.x, installing dependencies, building nodegui, compressing files, and uploading artifacts. Then, run a publish-npm-package job on ubuntu-latest that installs dependencies, configures npm, and publishes the package to npm using NPM_PUBLISH_TOKEN from secrets.
